title: Rename device - new name on the FMD connected card
scenario: Renamed device name is not reflected on the connected card in the Find My Device screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure a Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is connected.
Tap the device name on the Home screen to open Device Settings.
Tap the device name field (e.g., 'Poly Voyager Focus 2') and rename it to a new name (e.g., 'My Poly Headset').
Confirm the rename by tapping Save or Done.
Navigate back to the Home screen.
Tap the Find My Device (FMD) option or navigate to the FMD screen.
Observe the device card displayed on the FMD screen.
expected: The device card on the Find My Device (FMD) screen displays the new name (e.g., 'My Poly Headset') that was set in Device Settings.
